title: brassica napus var. trilocularis
intro: Brassica napus var. trilocularis, also known as yellow rocket, is a type of plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, providing health benefits such as improved digestion and immune system function. Yellow rocket can be used to make herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
